title: crate-sieve-form-2r1
description: Two implemented features have no integration tests: (1) eval_envelope_test reads SMTP envelope from/to; the envelope extension is in KNOWN_EXTENSIONS and the evaluator path exists, but tests/rfc_vectors.rs has no test for it. (2) redirect is fully implemented (SieveAction::Redirect, evaluator.rs:128-130) but tests/rfc_vectors.rs has a stale comment saying redirect is not implemented (line 71). A redirect integration test is absent. Both are easily testable with compile() + evaluate() and a hand-traceable expected output.
